name: Margarita Sunrise
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Frozen orange juice (1 6-ounce can of thawed frozen concentrate)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the rims of 4 stemmed glasses with one lime half and dip them in granulated sugar.
2. Squeeze the juice from both lime halves into a blender container.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: powdered sugar, cracked ice, and frozen orange juice.
4. Cover and blend on high speed until foamy.
